installCommand: cd ../.. && cat /vercel/.npm/_logs/$(ls -t /vercel/.npm/_logs/ 2>/dev/null | head -1) 2>/dev/null; echo '--- env:'; env | grep -i npm; echo '--- pwd:'; pwd; echo '--- ls:'; ls -la; echo '--- npm version:'; npm --version; echo '--- attempting install:'; npm install --no-audit --no-fund --loglevel=verbose 2>&1 | tail -40; exit 1
